description: Update company's candidate settings. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/candidates/settings/unbiased_hiring. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include anonymous_candidates, fair_evaluations.

params.name: anonymous_candidates
params.description: Contains data about Anonymous Candidates feature - (enabled: boolean; required)

params.name: fair_evaluations
params.description: Contains data about Fair Evaluations feature - (enabled: boolean; required)

example_request:
PATCH /c/{company_id}/candidates/settings/unbiased_hiring

Required params: company_id

Optional params: anonymous_candidates, fair_evaluations
